text:
TSLA Corp. - Form 10-Q Quarterly Report (Q3 2024)
Ticker: TSLA | Quarter: Q3 2024 | Page: 18
Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis
Quarterly net revenue for Q3 2024 was $15154 Million, up 5% compared to Q3 2023.
| Quarter | Q3 2024 ($M) | Q3 2023 ($M) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Total Quarterly Revenue | 15154 | 8854 |
| Net Income | 3254 | 1164 |
Cash and Cash Equivalents ended the quarter at $24654 Million.
